recommendations.title: The Grapes of Death
recommendations.overview: A young woman discovers that the pesticide being sprayed on vineyards is turning people into murderous lunatics.

recommendations.title: Where's the Money
recommendations.overview: A quick witted young man from the streets of South Central must rush a lily-white USC fraternity to recover a stash of stolen money.

recommendations.title: Init!ation

recommendations.title: Hell Night
recommendations.overview: As an initiation rite into Alpha Sigma Rho fraternity, four pledges must spend a night in Garth Manor, twelve years to the day after the previous resident murdered his entire family.

recommendations.title: Vamp
recommendations.overview: Two fraternity pledges go to a sleazy bar in search of a stripper for their college friends, unaware it is occupied by vampires.

recommendations.title: Night of the Creeps

recommendations.title: Monolith
recommendations.overview: A desperate young journalist turns to podcasting to salvage her career, but her rush to make headlines leads her to an alien conspiracy.

recommendations.title: Mercy
recommendations.overview: Brought together at their childhood home over their dying mother, an estranged family is thrust into a deadly fight for their own survival.

recommendations.title: American Gothic
